summary: The diff implements most of the required changes: REQ-1 (payment gate removed from Login.tsx), REQ-2 (Students page shows approvals + payments with status), REQ-3 (ManageStudentSessions dropdown built from approvals/payments), REQ-4 (ManageStudentMaterials dropdown built from approvals/payments), and REQ-5 (backend getSessionsForStudent/getMaterialsForStudent use only principal/user permission checks). However, REQ-3 has a partial implementation issue where the dropdown logic builds studentOptions from approvals but the payment matching is broken (no principal linkage). REQ-2 also has a broken payment-per-principal mapping left as an empty loop.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each student row shows their payment status and active status badge; students who have paid and are active are visually distinguished from pending students
missing_requirements.reason: In Students.tsx, the paymentsByPrincipal map is built inside an empty for-loop with no data inserted, because payments use email and cannot be linked to principal. The per-student payment status display is therefore non-functional.

missing_requirements.requirement: The student dropdown in ManageStudentSessions shows all enrolled/booked/active students so admin can select and add sessions for any such student
missing_requirements.reason: In ManageStudentSessions.tsx, the studentOptions loop attempts to find a matchingPayment using p.status.__kind__ === 'approved' without linking it to the approval's principal. The approvedPayments variable is built but never added to studentOptions. The dropdown may not correctly show all enrolled/booked students.
